---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for GridLock
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "It is frustrating when debugging 64 ranks to manually check which ones hit the barrier...")

**Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How should this manifest in the Qt6 UI or the DAP/GDB backend?

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (e.g., using GDB Python scripts, external profilers, or CLI commands).

**GridLock Subsystem Context**
Which part of the architecture does this primarily affect? (Select all that apply)
- [ ] Qt6 / Wayland Frontend (UI/UX, Views, Docks)
- [ ] GDB/MI & DAP Orchestration (`GdbRankCoordinator`, `DapCoordinator`)
- [ ] High-Performance Computing (Spack, SLURM integration)
- [ ] Zero-Copy Native Memory Engine (`process_vm_readv`)
- [ ] Build System / CI Pipeline (Meson, AppImage)
- [ ] Other: 

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or structural ideas about the feature request here.
